# Fast Fleets 360 LOGISTICS

Fast Fleets 360 LOGISTICS is an on-demand dispatch, courier, and parcel delivery platform for customers, businesses, riders, and fleet partners in Nigeria.

Primary services:
- Dispatch rider booking for documents, retail parcels, food, grocery, pharmacy, and urgent errands.
- Same-day delivery with bike, car, and van options.
- Live delivery tracking, courier matching, wallet payments, Paystack references, and customer dashboard records.
- Rider onboarding with KYC, vehicle details, operating zones, payout records, and driver support.
- Business logistics for vendors, offices, repeat deliveries, and fleet operations.

Important public URLs:
- Home: https://fastfleetlogistics.pages.dev/
- App home: https://fastfleetlogistics.pages.dev/mainpage.html
- Book delivery: https://fastfleetlogistics.pages.dev/order.html
- Track delivery: https://fastfleetlogistics.pages.dev/track.html
- Customer dashboard: https://fastfleetlogistics.pages.dev/dashboard.html
- Rider onboarding: https://fastfleetlogistics.pages.dev/driver.html
- Support: https://fastfleetlogistics.pages.dev/support.html
- Privacy policy: https://fastfleetlogistics.pages.dev/privacy.html
- Terms: https://fastfleetlogistics.pages.dev/terms.html

Search topics:
dispatch riders in Lagos, courier service Nigeria, same-day delivery Lagos, parcel delivery app, dispatch rider app, rider onboarding, business logistics Nigeria, bike delivery service, van delivery Lagos.
